section.heading: Purposes for grants
section.chapeau: A grant made under section 6001 of this title may be used by a grantee to—

paragraph.content: enforce a law that requires individuals under the age of 16 to wear approved bicycle helmets on their heads while riding on bicycles;
provide assistance, to individuals under the age of 16 who may not be able to afford approved bicycle helmets, to enable such individuals to acquire such helmets;
develop and administer a program to educate individuals under the age of 16 and their families on the importance of wearing such helmets in order to improve bicycle safety; or
carry out any combination of the activities described in paragraphs (1), (2), and (3).

section.continuation: The Administrator shall review grant applications for compliance with this section prior to awarding grants.
